nodes.context: Albanian-American gang active in New York City metro area, involved in extortion, illegal gambling, murder, robbery.
Italian-American Mafia family based in New York City, involved in various rackets.
Italian-American Mafia family based in New York City, involved in racketeering and gambling.
Greek-American organized crime family based in New York City, involved in gambling and other rackets.

edges.context: Rudaj Organization had a tense meeting with Gambino leader Arnold Squitieri over territorial expansion.
Rudaj Organization attacked Greek associates of the Lucchese family to take over gambling operations in Astoria, Queens.
Rudaj Organization is listed as a rival of the Velentzas family in the infobox.
